description: Developer of an insurance purchasing platform created to get insurance cover and personal insurance products over mobile application. The company 's insurance purchasing platform offers a fully digitalized B2B2C insurance process covering all the key stages, including taking out cover, managing contracts, partnerships and aims reporting, enabling consumers to instantly meet their insurance needs online via a mobile app or in the stores of partner retailers.

name: Voya
description: Operator of an online platform intended to offer digital business travel service. The company's platform offers a travel assistant that uses artificial intelligence tools combined with the advisory of experienced travel experts, enabling travelers to efficiently manage travel expenses and save time.

name: PlayCanvas
description: Developer of a visual development platform for interactive web content. The company's visual editing tool lets users build scenes, applications and games in record time, manage project assets, to add interactivity and to communicate and work with the team, enabling developers to build, share and play video game through real-time collaboration.

name: Cloudpipes
description: Developer of a workflow automation service platform designed to connect various cloud applications. The company's platform bridges the integration challenges between custom or package applications deployed within a customer data center and new SaaS applications deployed in the cloud that applies integration between cloud services without coding, enabling users to integrate all the data from cloud application to one.

name: SkimBit
description: Provider of an affiliate marketing tool. The company offers SkimLinks that converts existing links into affiliate marketing links and SkimWords recognizes product references in editorial and user generated content and turns these into shopping links that can earn the publisher money.

name: Shoppr
description: Provider of a software test automation platform. The company's platform offers online testing of the development and progress of Web software.

name: GamerzClass
description: Provider of an online gaming platform intended to create step-by-step programs that improve gaming skills. The company's platform offers online courses, produces and sells learning material for e-sport players while also offering video courses in professional sports games that are developed in collaboration with leading players, enabling gamers to learn efficiently and improve their gaming experience.

name: Source Beauty
description: Operator of a beauty e-commerce platform intended to provide the best skincare, makeup, fragrances, and health products in the market. The company's platform seeks out the best skincare and makeup products and acts as a hub of information, enabling users to make well-informed and cost-saving purchases.

name: Homeday
description: Developer of an online platform designed to be used for data-driven pairing in the real estate sector. The company's online platform provides an application for buying and selling properties, enabling real estate agents to pair with private property owners to sell their property.

name: Codec
description: Developer of content marketing intelligence platform. The company develops content marketing intelligence platform for business enterprises for analysis of the media consumption behaviours of target audience through social platforms, and generation of unique content recommendations.

name: TRDATA
description: Provider of global institutional investment network. The company collects market information from remote places from scattered and illiquid markets and presents that information to the customer in an accessible platform.

name: JobPal
description: Developer of a job search application. The company develops an application which allows users to apply for jobs using their smartphones.

name: TheAmazeApp
description: Developer and provider of fashion blogging application. The company offers a mobile blogging application that helps users to share fashion tips, shop online and connect to bloggers, stylists and designers in Munchen, Germany

name: MoonFruit
description: Developer and designer of websites. The company is engaged in the designing, customization, styling and layout of websites that reflects a particular company's brand.

name: Stamplay
description: Developer of a cloud-based application programming interface platform designed to automate business operation. The company's platform facilitates digitize operation by creating workflows that map to real business processes and eliminate the lag between getting information from one department to the next, enabling developers from different sectors like, consumer support, sales, operation, marketing, human resource and finance to create web applications without writing back-end codes and eliminate manual work.

name: Your Superfoods
description: Provider of an online marketplace intended to provide organic food powder mixes. The company's marketplace offers organic oats containing antioxidants and vegan protein, enabling customers to get a nutritious boost in smoothies, juices, yogurt, muesli and snacks.

name: Brainient
description: Provider of video advertising technology platform. The company develops tools to create interactive video formats which can be delivered across a range of devices and reported on in real-time.

name: Iconfinder
description: Provider of an icon search engine designed to offer customized icon design. The company's icon search engine gives access to a library of icons through subscription, enabling web designers and developers to use graphical computer icons.

name: Quipper
description: Developer of an online education platform intended to assist students to learn anytime, anywhere, at their own pace. The company's online education platform provides an e-learning resource in a quiz format which allows users to create their own quizzes via a content-distribution process and engages various users worldwide, enabling users to learn in a fun way.

name: Stupeflix
description: Developer of mobile-based application designed to edit videos. The company's mobile-based application offers multimedia editing platform that allows to select video clips and combine them into a single film complete with transitions and music, enabling people and developers to make travel movies, wedding videos, promo ads and property virtual tours.
